# JEVH.creations

> Jasper Emmanuel Villar Huang (JEVH) is a multidisciplinary visual artist and designer specializing in traditional ballpoint pen and ink illustration, digital art, and photography.

## Identity & Monikers
* **Legal Name:** Jasper Emmanuel Villar Huang
* **Initials / Signature:** JEVH
* **Alternative Labels:** JEVH.creations, JEVH Art, JEVH Artist, JEVH Creations
* **Contact Monikers:** JEVH.reach, JEVH.vox

## Core Disciplines & Skills
* **Traditional Media:** Specialization in highly detailed ballpoint pen and ink illustrations.
* **Digital Media:** Digital art, visual design, and concept art.
* **Photography:** Visual photography collections.

## Creativity & AI Labelling Policy
* **JEVH.creations:** Strictly human-authored, hand-made creations (traditional art, digital designs, photography). Features a human-exclusive watermark. Strictly zero AI usage.
* **AI by JEVH:** Creative works produced with the assistance of artificial intelligence tools. Explicitly separated, categorized, and labeled apart from hand-made pieces.

## Links & Navigation
* [Home Portfolio](https://jevh-creations.github.io/): Main portfolio hub and information index.
* [Gallery](https://jevh-creations.github.io/gallery/): Core showcase of traditional illustrations, digital designs, and photography.

## Contact & Profiles
* [Email Contact](mailto:JEVH.reach@gmail.com): Primary channel for outreach and professional inquiries via JEVH.reach or JEVH.vox.
* [Facebook Profile](https://www.facebook.com/JEVH.creations/)
* [Instagram Profile](https://www.instagram.com/jevh.creations/)
* [ArtStation Portfolio](https://www.artstation.com/jevh8creations/)
* [DeviantArt Gallery](https://www.deviantart.com/solidussupremus/)
